summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GreenDev Associates corporate website - all core functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Service dropdown options not easily clickable in modal/overlay context
ui_bugs.workaround: Form submission works without service selection

design_issues.issue: Clients page navigation link not found in header menu

passed_tests: All 17 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero, stats counter, services, projects, testimonials, CTA sections
Navigation to About, Services, Industries, Projects, Team, Contact pages successful
Stats counter animation working with correct values (15+ years, 500+ projects, 6 industries, 50+ consultants)
Contact form submission successful with backend integration
Contact form success message displays correctly
Google Maps integration working on contact page
Admin login successful with correct credentials
Admin panel loads and displays contact submissions
Admin authentication and session management working
Backend seeded data (projects, team, testimonials, clients) loading correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Clients page navigation link in header menu - link not found during navigation testing

success_percentage.integration: 100% (contact form, admin auth, data loading all working)
